installCommand: echo '=== DEBUG ===' && pwd && ls -la && git clone --depth 1 --branch stable https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git /vercel/.flutter-sdk && export PATH=/vercel/.flutter-sdk/bin:$PATH && flutter --version && cd unburden_app && flutter pub get
buildCommand: export PATH=/vercel/.flutter-sdk/bin:$PATH && cd unburden_app && flutter build web --release --dart-define=API_BASE_URL=$API_BASE_URL
